trends.summary: A judge said residents had the option whether or not to waive potential future injury claims and cannot use a federal rule to undo the consequences of a deliberate choice.

trends.headline: Ex-MLB player Royce Clayton breaks down on stand during civil trial over fatal LA car crash
trends.summary: Former ballplayer Royce Clayton testified to fellow ex-player Scott Erickson telling him Erickson saw Rebecca Grossman hit two young brothers with her car.

trends.headline: Canada’s top court backs controversial national security law
trends.summary: Only one justice agreed with an Ontario law professor's argument that criminalizing the disclosure of confidential information unconstitutionally restricts lawmakers' speech.

trends.headline: We’re Now Scoring Wireless Headphones (and One of Them Already Hit 10/10)

trends.headline: Fewer and fewer Americans think Trump ‘keeps his promises,’ Pew survey finds
trends.summary: The percentages of Americans who think the president is honest, mentally sharp and a good role model have all also declined.

trends.headline: California sues kratom manufacturer, claims company ignored state embargo
trends.summary: California has filed a lawsuit against Ashlynn Marketing Group, alleging it continued manufacturing and distributing kratom products after state investigators embargoed and taped off products at its facility located in Santee, California.

trends.headline: Netflix’s ‘Narnia: The Magician’s Nephew’ Delayed to 2027 But Getting Full Theatrical Release
trends.summary: 'Narnia: The Magician's Nephew' has been delayed to 2027.

trends.summary: The news comes alongside the announcement that the release date has shifted to 2027 to allow for a full theatrical release.

trends.headline: Cloud Lamp #piday #raspberrypi @Raspberry_Pi
trends.summary: hyunjinkim1112 shares this really cool cloud lamp on instructables A glowing cloud that responds to your remote — pick from rainbow, sunny, cloudy, rainy, or thunderstorm moods, each with its own sound and lighting effect. Powered by a Raspberry Pi Pico 2W.

trends.headline: States are right to push back on the DOJ’s pursuit of voter data
trends.summary: The Department of Justice is demanding access to sensitive state voter data. There are compelling reasons for states to safeguard that data, like preserving the integrity of our elections.

trends.headline: Louisville launch new app for public safety during the Kentucky Derby
trends.summary: Louisville officials are using a new app, called Lou Ready, to help keep residents safe and informed during this year's Kentucky Derby.
